Friend, 60,000 Democrats have already voted by mail in this election, and most of them are over the age of 65. That means that our crucial bloc of Under-50s haven't voted yet! The best way to make sure our voters turn in their ballots is with personal text messages from our supporters over the next 3 days. The good news is that thanks to you, we've already hit our fundraising goal! But, in order to text every young voter this weekend, and again on Election Day, we need more support. Our goal is to raise another $1,500 right now to ensure we can reach every last voter before the polls close Tuesday. name: Team Kennedy
subject: [co-sign legislation] Let's build support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
|
---
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390604/55b66746/20cf0970/80eb9be/1082325372/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---
Health care for all. In the richest nation on Earth, that shouldn't be too much to ask.
We are in the throes of a global pandemic and one thing is clear: Our profit-driven health insurance system is ill-equipped to handle it.
30,000,000 Americans are now out of work. For many, that means not only a loss of wages - but of health insurance. So tens of millions find themselves lacking coverage during the largest public health crisis of our time.
That's why Joe joined Congresswoman Pramila Jayapal to introduce The Medicare Crisis Program Act -- a first of its kind policy to enroll every unemployed American into Medicare immediately and expand Medicaid for vulnerable patients. Then, it goes an extra step to eliminate copayments, coinsurance, and deductibles for all COVID-19 testing and treatment. This is a critical step in getting people the coverage they need right now -- as we continue to fight for Medicare for All.
**Every American deserves access to high-quality healthcare. Not only during a pandemic - but every day going forward. [Will you sign on today as a citizen co-sponsor of The Medicare Crisis Program Act to help generate public support for this critical piece of legislation?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390604/55b66746/20cf0970/80eb9bf/1082325372/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedycong.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/medicare-for-all-become-a-co-sponsor")**
**Become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the Medicare Crisis Program Act**

Joe Kennedy III
Pramila Jayapal
>> You!
---
**[BECOME A CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390604/55b66746/20cf0970/80eb9bf/1082325372/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedycong.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/medicare-for-all-become-a-co-sponsor")**
---
In the richest most powerful nation in the world, you should be able to get the health care you need when you need it. Losing your job during a global pandemic shouldn't prevent anyone from receiving care. Those who have lost their jobs did so through no fault of their own. We must make sure they are protected.
Never has the need for Medicare for All been clearer. This is going to be the fight of our time in the days and weeks and months ahead. The Medicare Crisis Program Act will help us get there -- proving that this country is capable of providing coverage for all of its people.
**Help us grow public support for this critical piece of legislation.[Will you add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor?](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390604/55b66746/20cf0970/80eb9bf/1082325372/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedycong.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/medicare-for-all-become-a-co-sponsor")**
**[SIGN ON& CO-SPONSOR -> ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390604/55b66746/20cf0970/80eb9bf/1082325372/VEsD/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://kennedycong.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/medicare-for-all-become-a-co-sponsor")**
---
Stay safe. Stay well. And thank you for the support. Let's keep fighting for health care for all.
-- Team Kennedy

body:
With two months until the runoff, here's where we stand.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890071/7f51f7bc/4e4666cc/4ef6b38a/3998252534/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | _Peter -- As one of MJ 's strong supporters, I wanted to loop you in on our most recent State of the Race Memo. Please see below for more information about our path to victory in Texas, and then **[donate to make it a reality](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890071/7f51f7bc/4e4666cc/4ef6b389/3998252534/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200517.2nd__1424__&amount=10")**.

\--Preston Elliott, Campaign Manager_

**Executive Summary:**
* MJ took first place in the primary.
* The runoff is July 14th, less than two months from now.
* Texas is one of the top ten most likely Senate seats to flip in 2020.
* The _Cook Political Report_ has already upgraded their race ranking in MJ's favor.
* Sen. Cornyn's allies have seen polling that scares them, and they're funnelling money into Texas to keep him in office.
* **[Support from our grassroots donors is critical to keeping up our momentum, winning the runoff, and defeating Sen. Cornyn in November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890071/7f51f7bc/4e4666cc/4ef6b389/3998252534/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200517.2nd__1424__&amount=10")**

With the runoff coming up in just under two months, _CNN_ just reported that "Democrats are slight favorites for Senate control." And one thing is clear: Texas will be the biggest battleground state.

Special interests and corporate PACs are coming out of the woodwork to save Sen. Cornyn, with a Koch-aligned super PAC spending more in Texas than ever before. We need a grassroots effort to take all of them on, and that's where our supporters come in. [**DONATE NOW**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890071/7f51f7bc/4e4666cc/4ef6b389/3998252534/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0MjQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-runoff?refcode=email_20200517.2nd__1424__&amount=10") Thanks to our grassroots team, we're in a strong position to win the runoff and stand up to Sen. Cornyn -- IF we keep this momentum going. We've got over 42,000 grassroots donors and an average online donation of $23, and so far we've hit every fundraising goal we've set.

However, Sen. Cornyn has nearly $13 million cash on hand thanks to help from Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and countless other special interests. Plus, he's getting propped up by all those special interest groups and corporate PACs we already mentioned.

**We need your help to take them on -- donate to help MJ keep up her momentum through the runoff and beat Sen. Cornyn.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The U.S. Postal Service is in serious danger.
| | |
---
Friend,

**The U.S. Postal Service is in _serious_ ****danger:** Postal workers are getting sick, mail volume is dropping - and without emergency funding, this vital institution could be insolvent by September.
**We can 't let this happen, friend.** An insolvent Postal Service would mean 600,000 hardworking people could lose their jobs. It would make it harder for communities across our country - especially those in rural areas - to access lifesaving medications, wages and Social Security benefits. And with millions of voters planning to cast their ballots by mail this November, it could put our constitutional right to vote at risk.
I'm raising my voice to support this essential service, but congressional action is the _only_ thing that can save the USPS from catastrophe - and I need your help to demand it. **[_Please, friend, will you click here to add your name to our petition demanding Congress take action now to save the Postal Service? Since this is so urgent, I 'm looking to get 2,000 signatures by midnight tonight._](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=Warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-priorities-refresh%3Fcode%3Djtk230-ja-nd")**

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Do you want charades or solutions?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marsha for Senate
body:
I am committed to taking on the Communist Party of China and holding them accountable for their continued deception and irresponsibility.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjAxNzYS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY0NjQ3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
__

Peter,

China is starting to get scared...

I have been vocal in calling China out since I joined the Senate. And now, because of my efforts to hold them legally and financially accountable for the coronavirus pandemic, the Communist Party of China has threatened to sanction me.

I am committed to taking on the Communist Party of China and holding them accountable for their continued deception and irresponsibility. As a nation, we must unite to call China out, but I need your help.

[**Sign the petition to hold China accountable!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjAxNzYS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY0NjQ3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Washington Democrats want to put all the blame on President Trump for this global health and economic crisis. They've decided to make a partisan game out of COVID-19 in hopes of winning back the Senate in November instead of fighting for solutions for hardworking Americans and holding China accountable for their role in the pandemic.

With your signature, we can show the Left that we want real solutions and action, not their charades -- we want to hold China accountable.

**Help us fight back against the Democrats in Washington: Add your name to hold China accountable**

**[**Sign the petition now **](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1MjAxNzYS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTY0NjQ3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
---

Thank you in advance for your support,

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

********
Paid for by Marsha for Senate
